meaning: n.鹰,掠夺他人的人,鹰派成员vi.放鹰,像鹰一般地袭击,清嗓,咳嗽vt.捕捉,咳出,兜售,(沿街)叫卖,散播
examples: A hawk hovered over the hill.
The hawk poised in mid-air ready to swoop.
Can you all watch me like a hawk a second?
Hawk, a 31-year-old wholesome-looking father of two, was virtually unknown outside the skateboarding world three years ago.
Also, software game-developer Activision started selling Tony Hawk's Pro Skater, a game featuring Hawk's pyrotechnics.
